title: custom_emoji_query: validate filter_space_id for empty string
description: In custom_emoji.rs custom_emoji_query, when input.filter_space_id is Some(sid), sid is not validated for empty string before being included in the filter JSON. An empty spaceId would reach the server. Consistent with all other methods, add: if sid.is_empty() { return Err(ClientError::InvalidArgument(...)) } before inserting into the filter.
